reviews.title: we had problems
reviews.text:
Pros: NgAn from the privilege lounge gave us amazing service and made our stay pleasant and 5 starts like. 

Cons:  The problem was with our room, they could not solve it, it took them an hour to solve it and then they downgraded us to room 2005 with not good view, why they didn’t give us equally good room or upgraded us for a better room as compensation for the time we lost and the inconvenience we had??!
reviews.response:
Dear ron,

Thank you so much for taking to to sharing your experience regarding your stay at Grand Mercure Da Nang.
We delight to hear that our service at 21th floor had met your expectation. Especially, Ms Ngan bring the best service to you and all our guest as well.
Regarding the bad thing as you mentioned, please allow me to express my sincerest apologies. I just would like to make it clear that we didn't downgrade your room, in that case, we really tried to arrange your room and your parent's room (2010) was located the same floor, I hope that you can recognize what we did for you.
Once again, we appreciate your sharing your concerns, and it is our hope that you will give us the opportunity to better serve you in the near future.

Grand regards,

Vo Hoang Phuong Tam (Ms.)
Assistant Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Disappointment
reviews.text:
We booked a room that included the executive lounge.

Good things: Miss NgAn from the lounge at the 21 floor gave us friendly and professional / excellent service, her English and communication skills are great. The food at the lounge is great.

Bad things: 

Upon arrival we were taken to the lounge at 21 floor for check in which was nice, then we were assigned a room at the 17 floor. When we enter the room it had a very strong mildew / smoke smell and the room was old /worn down, the view was a very nice bridge view. We called 0 and to let them know about the terrible smell, after an hour and 2 more calls they finally sent the bellmen with new keys, we were given a room at floor 20, the room at floor 20 didn’t have a smell however the view was city view / not nice view. We were disappointed because to resolve our issue they downgraded us :( 

Bad things: the location, it’s remote you must take a taxi everywhere, they don’t offer a shuttle to / from the airport, to the beach or downtown.

귀하의 우려사항을 공유해 주셔서 감사드리며 가까운 시일 내에 더 나은 서비스를 제공할 수 있는 기회를 제공해 주시기를 바랍니다.

감사합니다,
Le Kim Do (Mr.)

Hopefully, we will have a chance to welcome you back in the near future.

Grand regards,

Tran Thi Minh Thao (Ms.)

reviews.title: Super séjour dans cet hôtel et L équipe du service clientèle est incroyable 200%
reviews.positives:
Super séjour dans cet hôtel que je recommande à 100 % ! L’emplacement est vraiment idéal : proche du centre-ville, parfait pour se déplacer facilement, mais aussi très agréable pour admirer le pont du Dragon et aller à la plage.
J’ai particulièrement adoré pouvoir assister au feu du Dragon directement depuis ma chambre, c’était une expérience magique !
Le petit déjeuner est tout simplement fabuleux : on y mange très bien, il y a beaucoup de choix et tout est impeccable. La propreté est irréprochable et honnêtement, il n’y a absolument rien à redire sur quoi que ce soit.
Un immense merci également au personnel du service clientèle qui a été absolument fabuleux. Que ce soit la team manager ou les deux autres messieurs, ils ont été exemplaires, attentionnés et vraiment incroyables tout au long du séjour.
Je recommande cet hôtel à tout le monde sans hésiter !
Amazing stay at this hotel — I recommend it 100%! The location is perfect: close to the city center, very convenient for getting around, and also ideal for enjoying the Dragon Bridge and going to the beach.
I especially loved being able to watch the Dragon fire show directly from my room — it was a magical experience!
The breakfast is simply fantastic: the food is delicious, there is plenty of choice, and everything is spotless. The cleanliness throughout the hotel is impeccable and honestly, there is absolutely nothing to complain about.
A huge thank you to the customer service team who were absolutely wonderful. The team manager and the two other gentlemen were exemplary, attentive, and truly amazing throughout our stay.
I would highly recommend this hotel to everyone without hesitation!
reviews.negatives:
Le seul petit point négatif concerne un malentendu avec le linge de salle de bain. Le service de nettoyage avait retiré deux linges sales que j’avais laissés sous le lavabo et ne les avait pas remplacés. Le lendemain, j’ai trouvé sur mon lit un papier me demandant où étaient passés ces deux linges, ce que je n’ai pas du tout apprécié. Voyageant seule, je me suis sentie un peu mise en cause à tort. Je me suis donc rendue au service client pour expliquer la situation et j’ai même proposé de monter dans ma chambre et d’ouvrir ma valise afin de clarifier les choses. Heureusement, la situation a pu être expliquée, mais je n’ai pas trouvé cette démarche très appropriée.
The only small negative point concerns a misunderstanding regarding the bathroom towels. The housekeeping staff had removed two used towels that I had left under the sink and did not replace them. The next day, I found a note on my bed asking where those two towels were, which I really did not appreciate. As I was traveling alone, I felt unfairly questioned. I therefore went to the customer service desk to explain the situation and even offered to go back to my room and open my suitcase to clarify everything. Fortunately, the situation was resolved, but I did not find this approach very appropriate.

reviews.text: Stayed here instead of on the beach strip, where it's much more expensive in high season. It's a brand new hotel, nice rooms, nice bathrooms. Staff isn't too familiar with the accor standards. AS a gold member you're supposed to get an upgrade upon check. Staff said she already upgraded me to seaview. After a few phone calls to a more senior staff it got sorted. Breakfast was bad though very basic, not at all what i am used to at any of the other accor hotels. Had a good gym, nice spa, didn't check the swimming pool. Would stay there again in high season as it was pretty convenient.

reviews.title: Transit to Danang
reviews.text: We were enroute to Danang for a beach holiday. However, as our flight landed at the airport in the evening, we decided to spend one night near the city centre first. Grand Mecure stood out as value-for-money accommodation relatively close to the airport (compared to the beach resorts along the way to Hoi An). The room was large, clean and well-designed. Only gripe we had about the hotel was that there aren't many F&B places that are within walking distance - appears that the hotel was built at a residential area.

reviews.title: Great value 5-star stay with amazing river views
reviews.positives: For a 5-nights stay, we got treated like VIP’s from the moment we checked in to our departure.  Staff were friendly without being over-bearing. Access to the Executive lounge for breakfast and evening canapés and drinks.  Nepresso compatible machines made the stay complete for my husband.
reviews.negatives: The highly advertised Seafood BBQ buffet on Friday evening was a bit underwhelmed.  Quality of food was average - but understandable considering the cost.

reviews.title: A few nights in Da Nang to spend New Year after Christmas in Phu Quoc
reviews.positives:
The club lounge and the staff there were excellent. The staff were friendly, efficient , helpful. 
The reception staff responded to requests and resolved issues promptly and with polite efficiency. 
The New Year’s Eve dinner was superb, with a wide selection of delicious buffet food and it was very good value for money. 
We were moved to a suite for our last two nights , which was beautiful, with fabulous views of the river
reviews.negatives:
The hotel was advertised on Booking.com as a five star hotel, but I felt our room was not what I expected from 5 star. 
The furniture was scratched and dated. 
The only drinking glasses available were in the bathroom so we had to request extra glasses .
I was surprised at the limited supply of toiletries- no body lotion (although this was provided in the suite)
We had to have an engineer to fix the television every day as it either wouldn’t work, or went off altogether while we were watching it. On our fourth day , the engineer came to the room four times to fix it! That’s when we were upgraded to a suite. 
The location on the river was good, but this meant it was quite a walk into town, though the shuttle service was good.

reviews.title: Beautiful luxurious hotel, with fabulous facilities (except for the swimming pool).
reviews.positives: Our family had access to the Club Lounge, which we used for breakfast on one morning and joined the Happy Hour (including dinner) every night. The staff throughout the hotel are amazing, specially in the Club Lounge and the dining room. The rooms are spacious and very comfortable. The walk-in shower was much appreciated, as we had combined tubs/showers in the other three hotels that we stayed in. The food in the ground floor restaurant was amazing.
reviews.negatives: The location of the swimming pool is a disaster. It is in full view of both a side road with pedestrians and traffic and the hotel reception foyer.  There is absolutely no privacy for swimmers. Also,there is a drain running almost alongside the pool, and the odour from the drain does not make for an enjoyable experience for swimmers. We mentioned this to the hotel General Manager, and he undertook to investigate this matter.

reviews.title: Sensational Hotel
reviews.positives: The room was clean and comfortable with a spectacular view over the river. The staff were friendly, helpful and professional. Lan in the priority lounge was exceptional even helping a parent distract an over wrought screaming child to calm down. The breakfast was excellent. We stayed overnight but wished we had stayed longer. The location was set back away from traffic on a little island on the river with restaurants close by. We met the general manager who came over and chatted to guests which was a nice touch. They did have shuttles to locations in danang. Best run hotel we had stayed in the last two months away.
reviews.negatives: Nothing everything was excellent

reviews.title: One of the best hotels in Danang
reviews.text:
I live near to Danang, so it is an easy weekend trip and so I go frequently. We have stayed at most of the top tier hotels in the area and I've planned a stay here every since it first opened about a year ago. 
   It was a very pleasant experience and Stefan, the new manager seemed to be everywhere at once (maybe he has a twin) seeing to every detail of the operation.  
   One of the highlights was the Dim Sum we had for lunch one afternoon; we supped for two hours while the culinary staff teased our taste buds with a wide variety of exotic and excellently prepared dishes that just kept coming and coming.  It was a fantastic way to relax and spend some time as a family and I highly recommend it.   
   One of the benefits of the Mercure is Location.  Centrally located between the city and the beach, you are near enough to sample the delights of Danang and close enough that a short taxi ride will put you on one of the world’s better beaches. 
   Some hotel operators seem to look on Agoda guests as second class, this was not the case here and they took the opportunity to promote their services and develop a lasting relationship.  
   All-in-all it was a good experience and we look forward to returning.

reviews.title: A pleasant stay.
reviews.text:
This is my second stay after four years. Although it’s a five-star hotel, it doesn’t feel very luxurious. Particularly, there are very few rooms with bathtubs, so once again I only had a shower with low water pressure. The location is also not very convenient as it is a bit far from the city center. 
Still, I’m glad I chose this hotel again.
The staff in the club lounge are all friendly and pleasant. The distant view of the dragon from my room and the night view from the club lounge are both beautiful. I am generally satisfied with the meals during breakfast and cocktail time in the lounge (especially the breakfast menu options are quite good).
The spa inside the hotel offers solid treatments and has big discounts for guests. 

I plan to stay at this hotel again next time.
reviews.response:
Dear ATSUKO,

Thank you for taking your time to share your feedback I am deeply sorry that we did not meet your expectations during you recent stay. Rest assured we will review your comments carefully and take the appropriate action.

Please do not hesitate to contact me at do.lekim@accor.com and I will be delighted to assist in anyway.

Best regards,
Mai Trang
Assistant Guest Relation Manager

reviews.text: We got in late after 10pm. After checking in we asked for recommendations to have a meal nearby.  The concierge staff was very helpful - he even rang up the restaurants to see if they were still opened. The front desk staff was also very helpful in helping us arrange for a tour that they did not represent. The hotel was clean, new, modern and adequate.  The fitness centre was not fully completed and was housed in a very small room. There was no spa service despite advertisement on their website. The hotel was a little far from downtown and the beach although it was easy enough to catch a taxi.

I was disappointed that the pool was not operating for two consecutive days, but they apologized and arranged for me to use the Novotel pool and even took me there. The male staff at the reception are friendly. The accommodation is clean and decent. If you have a river view, you can also see the Dragon Bridge view. Above all, the best part was the breakfast. While Mikazuki has many options, it wasn't very good, but the breakfast here had much more to enjoy.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Staff are really heplful and polite. the transportation provided bt the hotel is so conventient.

reviews.title: Great buy in Danang
reviews.text: I normally travel 4 start hotel or higher. If you stay for few nights for business, definitely stay Mercure Danang.
reviews.positives: No other words, but great Valne

reviews.title: This is actually the best hotel I have stayed in.
reviews.text: This is my most pleasant hotel stay ever. All staff members very helpful and the rooms are first class for me.
reviews.positives: The hotel was luxurious and the rooms are massive and food is great.

reviews.title: Great hotel for relaxing
reviews.text: This hotel was recommended by our Thai friend, the room are very nice and bed is very comfortable. The hotel manager is very friendly and polite. Recommended us a few places to go for sight seeing and where to good food in Danang. Very quiet hotel unlike other other nearer to the city with noise and air polution, this hotel with nice scenery from the room window, gym equipments are more advance than our home country,
reviews.positives: Very quiet and friendly hotel

reviews.title: Great Place to stay
reviews.text:
Great place to stay if you are catching a flight early morning. However we were impressed with their hospitality and their service on our 1 night stay. The chinese restaurant is also quite good. The rooms are very clean and really well built. We came from staying in the sunrise hoi an and so this place seemed like luxury compared to the poor workmanship and service they have in their hotel. 
The only fault was the bed, the mattress is rock hard. I know some people prefer that but I certainly didn't.
reviews.positives: location

reviews.title: Small rooms with great features
reviews.text: Great place to stay.  A little out of the centre of town.  NEar to airport.
reviews.positives: New, Clean, Great View and Pool

reviews.title: A lovely place for you to stay
reviews.text:
inspite of staying not longer, just only one night and leave early, but we spent a good night at this hotel. the room is very clean and nice, decoration is modern and elegant with glass window to let you have a whole view. wifi is free with high speed, and the lounge is also lovely place for the kids, too. my kids really like this hotel a lot, despite of without place for them to enjoy. we will turn back this hotel on the next trip.

however, there are something that reduce the hotel's value. the shower room has no any case to keep soap and shamppoo; the lavatory is so small; without adjustable night-lamp.
reviews.positives: Modern and nice decoration hotel, clean and new room, good view from any location, and worth for the 4 star hotel.

reviews.title: A quality new hotel
reviews.text: Just an overnight, but was very happy with the room and the service. Restaurant was fine too. The value was excellent though I guess we were on an opening promo price.
reviews.positives: Not just new but the quality of the fittings etc are of high quality.

reviews.title: Nice and new, central location
reviews.text: The F&B outlets are not fully operational. Staff is really friendly and speaks good english
reviews.positives: Lovely room, spacious and I love the bed

reviews.title: Great Location and Great Price.
reviews.text:
Booked the Hotel car to bring me visited the city and country side. The driver is friendly and drive with cares.

The reception offered me a late check out and they are very friendly.

Hotel opened just one month plus and very new. 

The lobby food is so so!!! suggested you eat outside! ( that's depend on individual )
reviews.positives: Hotel is new and the staff are friendly!

reviews.title: Great location and grand interior
reviews.text:
i like the hotel. nice and clean, quality finishes and furnishing. but it has just been opened for less than a month so the restaurant/f&b are still not fully operational.

reception staff is friendly and communicate well.
reviews.positives: Well furnished and quality finishes

reviews.title: Recommendations for travelers revisiting Da Nang.
reviews.text: First of all, the location is in between Han Market and My Khe Beach, which are popular tourist spots, so I would recommend it more for those who have visited 2-3 times rather than for first-time visitors. The hotel offers a free shuttle service, and although the timings may not be abundant, you can use it comfortably if you plan well! The room condition is very good, and the bed is comfortable as well. The breakfast is above average. The pool is located near the entrance on the first floor, so it's not very comfortable, but it's not too deep, so it's okay!
